mid_tier_activist_list_of_lgbtq_rights_a: List of LGBTQ rights activists is  activist with a Wikipedia page (mid-tier level of recognition). They have a Wikipedia entry that is linked from 7 language editions of Wikipedia (a measure of their global recognition; values 1-15 indicate moderate but not universal recognition). As a mid-tier activist, they represent the broader working population of their profession — established practitioners with verifiable records but typically not household names. LLM recognition of this individual depends on how widely their specific name has propagated into training corpora through media coverage and biographical references.
